## Your Power System’s Reliability and Resilience Checker

Analyze whether the protective relays are working in coordination. Avoid cascading faults in the system that can cost you operational discontinuity and expensive repairs.

The outcomes

## Reports that Make a Difference

Protection coordination study reports by Care Labs help future-proof your facility with a 360-degree view of these devices. It outlines the description of the power system, Short circuit analysis, protection Device Data like CT/PT ratios, Coordination analysis details like TCCs, relay setting calculations, proposed setting changes, and strategic protection schemes.
